Description:
Balitecture is an Australian-owned leading villa developer in Bali.
We are experienced in property design, construction, and propertymanagement. 
We offer end-to-end property development andmanagement services on the island,as well as architectural servicesinternationally. From our popular 1-bedroom 'hut' villas to 5-star resorts,no project is too small or too large.
Address: Jl. Raya Seminyak No.17, Seminyak, Kuta, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361
